notableEvents.label: Colt Emerson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colt Emerson grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Cole Young to 3rd. Victor Robles out at 2nd. Colt Emerson out at 1st.
